_comment: Pinned SMB Q1 2026 numbers. When year=2026 & quarter=1 is selected on the SMB page, the tool reads ONLY from this file (HubSpot fetch and database aggregation are bypassed). Edit this file to update displayed values. The Performance vs goal section uses 'reps[].achievement_usd' (booked totals). The Commission summary section uses 'commission.reps[]' which has paid amounts and pre-calculated payout values.
